cards.front: What is the primary goal of designing a deep learning network for forecasting time series data?
cards.back: To predict future values in a time series based on past trends and patterns

cards.front: What type of data do deep learning networks for forecasting time series data typically use?
cards.back: Historical time series data, often in the form of sequences or vectors

cards.front: What is a common method for evaluating the performance of a deep learning network for forecasting time series data?
cards.back: Mean Absolute Error (MAE) or Mean Squared Error (MSE)

cards.front: What is the key advantage of using recurrent neural networks (RNNs) for forecasting time series data?
cards.back: Ability to capture temporal dependencies and patterns in data

cards.front: What is the primary drawback of using traditional machine learning methods for forecasting time series data?
cards.back: Difficulty in capturing complex temporal patterns and dependencies
